name: The Perfect Block of the Raksha (Secret)

system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Bladed Melee
Type: Counter
Qi: 6

You dip and parry, meticulously evading strikes while deflecting them with your blade to stop the legendary Perfect Strike of the Phoenix Technique. This gives you a chance to deflect or evade the Perfect Strike of the Phoenix. If someone uses that Technique against you non-Cathartically, you may roll your Melee against their Damage roll. If you succeed you are not struck. This Technique is rumored to be the only defense against the Perfect Strike of the Phoenix. It cannot be used against any other Technique. The Perfect Block of the Raksha was lost ages ago when the Raksha clan was extinguished. Some say a manual with this Technique exists. Cathartic: This works even against a Cathartic Perfect Strike of the Phoenix.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.accessNotes: The Perfect Block of the Raksha was lost ages ago when the Raksha clan was extinguished. Some say a manual with this Technique exists. This Technique is rumored to be the only defense against the Perfect Strike of the Phoenix.
